mapper.update: UPDATE chat_session SET last_message = #{lastMessage}, last_message_time = #{lastMessageTime}, unread_count_user1 = #{unreadCountUser1}, unread_count_user2 = #{unreadCountUser2}, status = #{status}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM chat_session WHERE (user_id1 = #{userId} OR user_id2 = #{userId}) AND status = 1 ORDER BY update_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE chat_session SET last_message = #{lastMessage}, last_message_time = #{lastMessageTime}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE chat_session SET status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
